report.summary: Cycle v13: No new commits or deploys — git locks persist at 7 days. 680 uncommitted changes (47 modified, 1,196 untracked incl. 253 new page.tsx). Same blockers carry forward: git locks (P0), 2 use-client+metadata bugs, rate limiter unwired, defi-yields missing cache/fallback. Zero delta from v12.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: DELTA SINCE v12: No new pages built or published this cycle. 19 modified page.tsx files + 253 untracked page.tsx files sitting in working tree — all uncommitted.
ORPHAN AUDIT: 103 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES still have no matching page.tsx — unchanged. Will 404 if accessed.

CRITICAL BUG (carry-over): /learn/unichain-guide-2026 and /learn/appchains-app-specific-rollups-guide-2026 still have 'use client' + 'export const metadata' in same file. Metadata silently dropped by Next.js.

BUILD: Production build crashes with 'Bus error (core dumped)' in sandbox (OOM). TypeScript check shows errors in src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (25+ TS errors) — masked by ignoreBuildErrors:true in next.config.ts.
NO REGRESSIONS: No code changes committed since v12, so no new regressions possible.
TOTAL: ~1,110+ page.tsx files (253 untracked), 446 slugs in published-pages.ts (343 with matching page.tsx, 103 orphans), 174 pages in PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: API ROUTE FILES: All 6 core routes present — /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields.
LIVE HEALTH: Cannot verify from sandbox (curl returns 000 for all endpoints). Production is running the Mar 17 build (e999560) — API routes should be functional if Vercel is healthy.
CACHE: 5/6 routes have in-memory caching. /api/defi-yields has ZERO caching — fetches upstream on every request. Unchanged from v12.
FALLBACK DATA: Only /api/prices and /api/market-dominance have hardcoded fallback. 4/6 routes have NO fallback — will error on upstream failure.
RATE LIMITING: 0/6 core API routes wired to rate limiter. Only /api/cache-stats and /api/health reference it. Carry-over P1 — now 40+ cycles.
NO DELTA: No API route files modified since last cycle.

sections.title: DevOps
items: GIT LOCKS PERSIST: .git/HEAD.lock (Mar 16 11:17) + .git/index.lock (Mar 16 13:06) — now 7 full days. All git operations blocked.
LAST COMMIT: e999560 'publish: promote 2 pages to production (Day 62)' — Mar 17, 6 days ago.
LAST DEPLOY: Same commit. Production is running 6-day-old build. No deploy possible until git locks cleared.
WORKING TREE DRIFT: 680 entries in git status (47 modified tracked files + 1,196 untracked). Growing every cycle. Local-to-production divergence is severe.
CANNOT VERIFY VERCEL: Sandbox cannot reach degen0x.com (curl returns 000). Assume Vercel is serving the last deployed build normally.
ACTION REQUIRED [P0]: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → staged commits → push → Vercel auto-deploy. Every hour without this increases drift and regression risk.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Nothing. Zero commits, zero deploys, zero page promotions since v12.
WORKING TREE INVENTORY: 253 new page.tsx files, 19 modified page.tsx files, 47 total modified tracked files — all uncommitted and undeployable.
BLOCKER [P0 — 7 DAYS]: Git locks. This is the single bottleneck blocking ALL progress to production. Must be manually cleared.
BLOCKER [P1]: 2 pages with 'use client'+metadata bug (unichain, appchains) — programmer fix needed before promotion.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: Rate limiter not wired on any core API route.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 40+ CYCLES]: /api/defi-yields missing cache + fallback.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 orphan slugs, 3 pages missing StructuredData/Breadcrumb, 3 pages missing BackToTop.
RECOMMENDATION: Next action for Jefe — clear git locks, then do staged commits (group by feature) to reduce regression risk from 1,200+ file diff.
